title: cli.rs: blocking stdin read inside async function
description: Command::Post reads stdin with std::io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut buf) (a synchronous blocking call) inside an async fn on the tokio runtime. This stalls the executor thread for the duration of the read. Fix: use tokio::io::AsyncReadExt::read_to_string on tokio::io::stdin() with .await, keeping the executor free during the I/O wait.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
